description: Composition Purple shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with single button cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned placket, embroidered branding above the hem and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from arrow with its colour-happy, mood lifting hue has an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt or formal trousers, close toe pumps and a vibrant scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
